entries.title: mobile/src/features/timeline/components/TimelineImageViewer.tsx
entries.summary: The TimelineImageViewer component is responsible for rendering a timeline view of images within the application.
entries.content: mobile/src/features/timeline/components/TimelineImageViewer.tsx TypeScript interface TimelineImageViewerProps interface TimelineImageViewerProps function TimelineImageViewer function TimelineImageViewer({ images, initialIndex = 0, onClose, }: TimelineImageViewerProps) The TimelineImageViewer component has two main responsibilities: displaying an image timeline and handling user interactions to navigate through the content. User interactions include scrolling to the start of the timeline, selecting the currently visible item, or closing the component when it becomes focused. These responsibilities are implemented through various methods such as filtering images, determining the initial index, handling viewability changes, and updating the list of items.

entries.title: mobile/src/utils/home-helpers.ts
entries.summary: Utility functions for handling and formatting date and time related data.
entries.content: mobile/src/utils/home-helpers.ts TypeScript function normalizeCycleLabel function normalizeCycleLabel(raw?: string): string type GreetingInfo type GreetingInfo = { greeting: string; subGreeting: string; iconName: React.ComponentProps<typeof Ionicons>["name"]; }; function getTimeBasedGreeting function getTimeBasedGreeting(date: Date = new Date()): GreetingInfo function stripToUtcDay function stripToUtcDay(input: Date): Date function parseYmdUtc function parseYmdUtc(ymd: string): Date | null function diffDaysUtc function diffDaysUtc(start: Date, end: Date): number function computeLoveDaysFromStart function computeLoveDaysFromStart( loveStartDate: string | undefined, now: Date = new Date(), ): number | null function formatLoveDate function formatLoveDate(dateString?: string): string function getEventIcon function getEventIcon(category?: string): { name: React.ComponentProps<typeof Ionicons>["name"]; color: string; } Development of utility functions for date and time-related tasks. Implementation and testing of utility functions. Usage Notes: The following table provides an overview of the utilities' usage. Symbols: - `normalizeCycleLabel` (function): A function that normalizes a cycle label into a human-readable string. - `getTimeBasedGreeting` (function): A function that generates a custom greeting based on the current hour and day of the week. - `stripToUtcDay` (function): A utility function for stripping a date to UTC Day format. - `parseYmdUtc` (function): A function for parsing a string in YYYY-MM-DD format into a Date object. - `diffDaysUtc` (function): A function for calculating the difference between two dates in days. - `computeLoveDaysFromStart` (function): A function for computing the number of love days from a start date. - `formatLoveDate` (function): A function for formatting a date string into a human-readable format. - `getEventIcon` (function): A function that generates an event icon based on a category. symbols
